name: Zerodha-Style Trading Platform — Feign Client Upgrade
scenario: Upgrade the order-service from Topic 15.1 (RestTemplate) to use Feign Client. Replace all RestTemplate calls with a clean @FeignClient interface. Add error decoder, timeout configuration, and a RequestInterceptor that adds a correlation ID header to all inter-service calls.
description: Replace RestTemplate with @FeignClient in order-service. Same two-service architecture (market-service + order-service), but the inter-service calls are now declarative. Add ErrorDecoder for all error scenarios. WireMock tests validate the full Feign stack.

core.description: `MarketServiceClient` @FeignClient (url from `${market.service.url}`): getQuote(symbol) → GET /api/stocks/{symbol}/quote, listTradeable() → GET /api/stocks?tradeable=true, reserveShares(symbol, qty) → POST /api/stocks/{symbol}/reserve.
`CorrelationIdInterceptor` implements RequestInterceptor: adds 'X-Correlation-Id' header (UUID per request) to every Feign call. Registered as @Bean in MarketFeignConfig or globally.
Timeout configuration in application.properties: market-service connect-timeout=2000, read-timeout=3000. Global default: connect=5000, read=5000.
`TradeService` refactored: inject `MarketServiceClient` instead of RestTemplate. All three Feign methods called (getQuote + reserveShares). No RestTemplate remaining.

WireMock @SpringBootTest tests (5): successful BUY with reservation, symbol not found (404→SymbolNotFoundException), insufficient shares (409→InsufficientSharesException), market down (503→MarketServiceDownException), correlation ID header present in all calls.

bonus.description: Add logger-level=FULL for market-service in dev profile. Verify with a test that Feign logs are produced (check log output contains request/response details).
Add a second Feign client: `AccountServiceClient` that calls account-service to verify trading account is active before executing any trade. Add WireMock stub for both active and inactive states.
Write a Feign `ResponseInterceptor` that logs the correlation ID and response time for every Feign call. Output: '[FEIGN] market-service/getQuote | corr=abc123 | 45ms | 200 OK'.

data_to_use:
Same stock data as T15.1:
TCS: price=3890, available=true
PAYTM: price=475, tradeable=false

WireMock stubs:
GET /api/stocks/TCS/quote → 200 {symbol:TCS, price:3890, tradeable:true}
GET /api/stocks/PAYTM/quote → 200 {symbol:PAYTM, price:475, tradeable:false}
GET /api/stocks/UNKNOWN/quote → 404
POST /api/stocks/TCS/reserve → 200 (success)
POST /api/stocks/TCS/reserve (qty too large) → 409
GET /api/stocks/TCS/quote (market down) → 503
example_output:
# TradeService.executeTrade('TCS', 10):
[FEIGN] GET http://localhost:8081/api/stocks/TCS/quote
[FEIGN] Headers: X-Correlation-Id: 8f3a2b1c-...
[FEIGN] Response: 200 {symbol:TCS, price:3890.0, tradeable:true}
[FEIGN] POST http://localhost:8081/api/stocks/TCS/reserve?qty=10
[FEIGN] Response: 200 OK
Trade executed: ORD-TCS-10

# WireMock test results:
✓ executeTrade_TCS_BUY_success
✓ executeTrade_UNKNOWN_symbol_404
✓ executeTrade_insufficientShares_409
✓ executeTrade_marketDown_503
✓ executeTrade_correlationId_presentInHeaders

criteria: UUID header on all calls (15 pts)

ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. @EnableFeignClients on Application is mandatory. WireMock: new WireMockServer(wireMockConfig().port(PORT)), @TestPropertySource sets market.service.url=http://localhost:PORT. Header test: wm.stubFor(get(...).withHeader('X-Correlation-Id', matching('.+')).willReturn(...)). ErrorDecoder lambda: (methodKey, response) -> switch(response.status()) {...}.
submission_instructions: Push to GitHub. Show before (RestTemplate) and after (Feign) code in README. All 5 WireMock tests pass.
tips_for_success: WireMock port: use a port not used by your services (e.g., 9101)
Correlation ID test: stub with .withHeader('X-Correlation-Id', matching('.+')).willReturn(...)
concepts_reinforced: Timeout configuration per client and globally
WireMock as HTTP stub server for Feign testing
